notes: MosaicStack local generated/private evidence is intentionally repo-local and gitignored under .local-ai/. Runtime journal defaults to JOURNAL_FILE_PATH=.local-ai/state/runtime-journal.json when file mode is enabled; default JOURNAL_STORE_MODE is memory. Workflow model routing evidence defaults to MODEL_ROUTING_LOG_PATH=.local-ai/logs/WORKFLOW_MODEL_ROUTING.log.md when MODEL_ROUTING_LOG_ENABLED=true. Deterministic LLM router evidence defaults to LLM_ROUTER_LOG_PATH=.local-ai/logs/ROUTER_DECISIONS.log.md, LLM_MODEL_RUN_LOG_PATH=.local-ai/logs/MODEL_RUNS.log.md, and LLM_PROMPT_EVIDENCE_LOG_PATH=.local-ai/logs/PROMPT_EVIDENCE.log.md when router logging is enabled. GitHub action and integration auth state defaults are .local-ai/state/github-action-store.json and .local-ai/state/integration-auth-store.json when their file-backed modes are active. These paths are local/generated/private, not canonical source truth, not CI/premerge enforcement, and not autonomous trigger wiring.
